TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Lalood i Motan == 10/18 Romi'adan no likisi: Lalood i Motan. ​I 1871 miheca 10 folad 18 romi'ad, matiya to ko rakat no tamina no Ryukyu, malaheci ko demak mamipatiko to ko rakat no tamina minokay, nika caay ko kafana'an pakalitemoh to faliyos, o cecay tamina Miyakojima moraraw to ko rakat a mapawpaw saka itira to i Bayaowan (Mancu no Pintong). Tahacarcar to koya tamina a eca to kanga'ay romakat, talasekal to ko 69 ko tamdaw mikidama, katalasekalan ira ko 3 tamdaw ko ma'alolay a mapatay, dengan to 66 ko tamdaw ko talasekalan mapa'orip. ​​O sarakatay demak i Bayaowan koni, o lalengatan no lalood i Motan koni. ​Kafadesan no Miyakojima a tamdaw ​​Oya katacarcaran no tamina a sekal tala'ayaw i, malitemoh ko Payrang a tamdaw, o kanga'ayan a romakat nasa koya mapa'oripay tamdaw, nika i karomakatan i lalan, milengat ko faloco' no Payrang to tatiihay, cefisen naira ko dafong no tamdaw no Miyakojima, matalaw to koya tamdaw no tamina to kakari'angaw, saka nitelek to caira to piiked to Payrang a romakat. ​​​Pacarcar ko tamdaw no tamina i lalan a komaen patireng to ngayangay milafin, i ray a lalan militemoh haca ko Paiwan a finacadan (Kawse ngasaw), padamaen no finacadan caira, pafeli to kakaenen, patadoen haca paini to pilafinan. Saka tosa romi'ad, talalotok ko finawlan no sangasaw a mi'adop, mingitangit to tamdaw no tamina akaa kasadak nahan, tengil han to noya tamdaw no tamina malo sakaci'angi a katalawen. O nika eca ka songila' ko kalalicay (o nikafokil to sowal) ato rofoen no ngasaw a finacadan o sanay ko katalaw, matimiay saka, telak sato koya tamdaw no tamina a milaliw. ​​​​Oya sato, mafana' to ko finawlan no finacadan to nika eca pasifana' no tamdaw no tamina to piliyas, paretatenga o tatiihay koni demak sato, misatapang to misolap mihapinang toya tamdaw no tamina. O pilaliw noya tamdaw no tamina midoedo to 'alo malitemoh ko cecay laloma'an, o milali'acaay to Yincumin koni laloma'an, mihayda midama to tamdaw no tamina. Nika oya sato finawlan no finacadan matama to naira koya tamdaw no tamina, milaop a tayra toya kaitiraan no malali'acaay loma', caayto pakasongila' ko kalalicay no tawki, saka ira to ko cimapatayay tamdaw no tamina. Ikor to o kakitaan no Paoli ngasaw ci Yan yuwan ko misalofay to demak, mapa'oripay aca ko 12 tamdaw no tamina, mapadama to no citodongay, saka tosa miheca 6 folad sanga'ay sato ko piliyas a minokay naira. Awaay ko todong salongoc no Mancin to papotalay finawlan ​Katengilan koya mafadesay tamdaw no tamina itiya, maleca toya demak i Bayaowan, mipadama ko Mancin toni, saka patilidan no Ryukyu to piaray, saka awaay ko sapitiyolaw to ikor noni a demak. ​​O Dipong sato itiya, o Meijiishin, mipalasawad to mi'erecay pikowan, pasitenokay ko pirikec, palasawad to kasasiiked no pikowan, o nano Satsuma-han pala o Kagoshima ken. Nikawrira oya nano Satsuma-han ko pidoedoan no Ryukyu i, saan pasi Congko ko padahof, orasaka "Tosaay ko pasayraan" pakayraan caay ho kafalic, nika o Dipong halafin to ko pisamawmaw to saki Congko Dipong a kalali'acaan sakinaira no kicay, o sakanga'ayaw no Dipong ya sanay, saka pakayni toya demak i Bayaowan ko sakatadamaan no pidemak. ​​​I 1873 miheca, pakayni demak i Bayaowan, miocor ko Dipong to misolapay mitengil to Mancin masamaan to demak i Bayaowan, katengilan o nika laheci pakayniay sapipadafoh ato pipanokay a demak, awaay ko kihar saki no Dipong a todong, oya sato Dipong to mafadesay mifotingay i, nawiro caay pipakinali to miri'angay yincumin no Taywan sato, paini sato koya citodongay Mincin "o yincumin o papotalay no nikowanan a finawlan ciira, o tatefocen mimaan, tengil sa ko no namo pidemak" sato. Midotoc to "papotalay nikowanan finawlan" sanay a sowal, o pidoedoan to no Dipong a pakayraan milood. Kalalood i Motan ​Pakalayap to sakacitodong i, misamawmaw to ko Dipong tonini a demak, oya kakeridan no sofitay ci Saigo Tsumoru michi ko mamikerid to sofitay, pasiInkiris, Amilika micaliw to tamina no sofitay ato komong kalalood ci Ri sentoku, ikor sarakatay sotoku no Taywan ci Kabayama Sukenori o nisolapay to Taywan itiya. ​​I 1874 mihecaan, masapinang to no Inkiris, Amilika ko pisamawmaw no Dipong itiya, ona painiay to ko Mancin to ratoh, miselicay ko pinangan no Mancin itiya, oya nano "papotalay nikowanan finawlan" patiyol to "talacowa koya finawlan caay ka i rikec no Congko, nika i salaloma'ay sakwan no Congko caira" sato, o Inkiris, Amilika patikol miala toya tamina. ​​​O nipipaekel no saki kacacofelan a demak no Dipong itiya, telak sato pipalasawad demak no sofitay, nikawrira pakalayap ci Saigo Tsumoru michi to pi'eses to nika koesit ko paca'of nira, sacisowal sa o sakalasawad no kacitodong no kakeridan ako ko pilood to yincumin ko nga'ay saan, saka pakonira han to no Dipong, nika ikor no demak nicorcoran ko tatiihay nidemakan nira. ​​​​I 1874 miheca 5 folad 12 romi'ad, sofitay no Dipong ira ko 3,600 tamdaw nai Seliao (Cecen no Pintong) macakat, ira ko kalaloot itiya. 5 folad 22 romi'ad, malalood to i Simen (Simen no Motan i Pintong), talacowa kiemel ko Paiwan finacadan, nika cango'ot ko sapilood ato caay ka 'aloman ko tamdaw, masafa to a tararikor. I 6 folad 1 romi'ad, milefek to no Dipong ko kasangasaw finawlan, ma'emin matodoh ko loma' itiya. 7 folad 1 romi'ad, kasangasaw finawlan matapi' to, nanoya sa paherek kina lalood. Paromaay nisafaloco'an a demak ​Patireng to kahiceraan i paherek to lalood no Dipong, nika caay ka tatami ko ka'orip a tadancaay, dotocen ko pisa'osi i, malifongay malitosaay ko tamdaw, roma a sowal, kaitini i Taywan, salongan ala kina tosa ciadada to salifong, madengaay mapatay mata'elif ko 500 tamdaw, patinakoen i kalaloodan mapatayay caay ka raod ko 20 tamdaw, o caay ka nanam to romi'ad a cimafadesay to tamdaw ko Dipong. ​​Ikor no piocor no Dipong to sofitay ni ocoran no Mancin nisolap to Taywan ci Shen Baozhen itiya, ipisolapan to kalodemak miraod to sofitay no Dipong to sapifootaw. Ikor no kalaloodan a masasowal, miliyaw ko Mancin to todong salongoc sakowan, milongoc to piliyas sofitay no Dipong, orasaka cango'ot to tamdaw ato dafong ko Dipong saka tararikor o sanay to i kalalicayan, kilim o sanay to tarokos no Inkiris a ci Vetoma a masasili'ay. Onirihanaw ni Vetoma to kalali'aca no demak, saka sa'icel o sanay to masasowal. I 10 folad 31 romi'ad, masasitelek ko tatosaay to "Beijing patodongan telek", patodongan no telek o "padama to finawlan a lowad" ko pihamon piocor no Dipong to sofitay. ​​​O lalowadan no Dipong kai "padama to finawlan a lowad" a "finawlan" todong pihamon to finawlan no Ryukyu, matiya o sapihayda no Mancin ono Dipong a todong ko Ryukyu o sanay, o sapilaheciaw no Dipong mihaop to Ryukyu "Ryukyu a setek", saka patireng sato to Okinawa-ken, milaheci to pasitenokay ko pirikec ato no niyaro' a sakowan. Ikor miliyang ko Mancin tonini, todong "finawlan" sanay o pilecad pidama to mafadesay a mifotingay I'ayaw, nika awaay ko paherekan no kasasowal, tangasa to i Nisshinsenso (Jiawu zhanzheng) a matapi', awaay to ko faloco' no Mancin to saki salongoc to Ryukyu a malaliyang, nanoya sa mihaida ko kasakitakit tonini. ​​​​Ikor a kalalood i Motan, mafalic to ko pidemak no Mancin toya asimaanay sanay pinangan, halo patireng to citodongay mikowan kasaniyaro' sakowan ato pasisawali ko pimatang, itiya to masapinang ko sakilalood no pala a fana'. Nika mapaini to ko Dipong to kacifades no salifong, o nianay ko pisahalaka no Dipong to sakiisi isingan ko pakayraan no demak. Mikawitay: Chen Baiyan (Sin Taywan hepíng kikingkay) === Mifalicay: Masao Nikar ===
S.PHON: == ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i mo~utan == **/** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan no~u ɾikisi: ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i mo~utan. *i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, matija to~u ko~u rakat no~u tamina no~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u, maɾaħəʦi ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak mamipatiko~u to~u ko~u rakat no~u tamina mino~ukaj, nika ʦaaj ko~u kafanaʡan pakaɾitəmo~uħ to~u faɾijo~us, o~u ʦəʦaj tamina mijako~ujima mo~uraraw to~u ko~u rakat a mapawpaw saka itira to~u i b~b~vajao~uwan (manʦo~u~u no~u pinto~uŋ). taħaʦarʦar to~u ko~uja tamina a əʦa to~u kaŋaʡaj ro~umakat, taɾasəkaɾ to~u ko~u ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mikiɬ~ɮama, kataɾasəkaɾan ira ko~u * tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u maʡaɾo~uɾaj a mapataj, ɬ~ɮəŋan to~u ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u taɾasəkaɾan mapaʡo~urip. **o~u sarakataj ɬ~ɮəmak i b~b~vajao~uwan ko~uni, o~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i mo~utan ko~uni. *kafaɬ~ɮəsan no~u mijako~ujima a tamɬ~ɮaw **o~uja kataʦarʦaran no~u tamina a səkaɾ taɾaʡajaw i, maɾitəmo~uħ ko~u pajraŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u kaŋaʡajan a ro~umakat nasa ko~uja mapaʡo~uripaj tamɬ~ɮaw, nika i karo~umakatan i ɾaɾan, miɾəŋat ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u pajraŋ to~u tatiiħaj, ʦəfisən naira ko~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u mijako~ujima, mataɾaw to~u ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina to~u kakariʡaŋaw, saka nitəɾək to~u ʦaira to~u piikəɬ~ɮ to~u pajraŋ a ro~umakat. ***paʦarʦar ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina i ɾaɾan a ko~umaən patirəŋ to~u ŋajaŋaj miɾafin, i raj a ɾaɾan miɾitəmo~uħ ħaʦa ko~u paiwan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan (kawsə ŋasaw), paɬ~ɮamaən no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦaira, pafəɾi to~u kakaənən, pataɬ~ɮo~uən ħaʦa paini to~u piɾafinan. saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taɾaɾo~uto~uk ko~u finawɾan no~u saŋasaw a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up, miŋitaŋit to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina akaa kasaɬ~ɮak naħan, təŋiɾ ħan to~u no~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina maɾo~u sakaʦiʡaŋi a kataɾawən. o~u nika əʦa ka so~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u kaɾaɾiʦaj (o~u nikafo~ukiɾ to~u so~uwaɾ) ato~u ro~ufo~uən no~u ŋasaw a finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u sanaj ko~u kataɾaw, matimiaj saka, təɾak sato~u ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina a miɾaɾiw. ****o~uja sato~u, mafanaʡ to~u ko~u finawɾan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u nika əʦa pasifanaʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina to~u piɾijas, parətatəŋa o~u tatiiħaj ko~uni ɬ~ɮəmak sato~u, misatapaŋ to~u miso~uɾap miħapinaŋ to~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina. o~u piɾaɾiw no~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u ʡaɾo~u maɾitəmo~uħ ko~u ʦəʦaj ɾaɾo~umaʡan, o~u miɾaɾiʡaʦaaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin ko~uni ɾaɾo~umaʡan, miħajɬ~ɮa miɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina. nika o~uja sato~u finawɾan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan matama to~u naira ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina, miɾao~up a tajra to~uja kaitiraan no~u maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj ɾo~umaʡ, ʦaajto~u pakaso~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u kaɾaɾiʦaj no~u tawki, saka ira to~u ko~u ʦimapatajaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina. iko~ur to~u o~u kakitaan no~u pao~uɾi ŋasaw ʦi jan jo~u~uwan ko~u misaɾo~ufaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, mapaʡo~uripaj aʦa ko~u ** tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina, mapaɬ~ɮama to~u no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, saka to~usa miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saŋaʡaj sato~u ko~u piɾijas a mino~ukaj naira. awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u manʦin to~u papo~utaɾaj finawɾan *katəŋiɾan ko~uja mafaɬ~ɮəsaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina itija, maɾəʦa to~uja ɬ~ɮəmak i b~b~vajao~uwan, mipaɬ~ɮama ko~u manʦin to~uni, saka patiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u to~u piaraj, saka awaaj ko~u sapitijo~uɾaw to~u iko~ur no~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak. **o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ sato~u itija, o~u məijiisħin, mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u miʡərəʦaj piko~uwan, pasitəno~ukaj ko~u pirikəʦ, paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u kasasiikəɬ~ɮ no~u piko~uwan, o~u nano~u satso~u~uma-ħan paɾa o~u ka*o~usħima kən. nikawrira o~uja nano~u satso~u~uma-ħan ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uan no~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u i, saan pasi ʦo~uŋko~u ko~u paɬ~ɮaħo~uf, o~urasaka "to~usaaj ko~u pasajraan" pakajraan ʦaaj ħo~u kafaɾiʦ, nika o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ħaɾafin to~u ko~u pisamawmaw to~u saki ʦo~uŋko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan sakinaira no~u kiʦaj, o~u sakaŋaʡajaw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ja sanaj, saka pakajni to~uja ɬ~ɮəmak i b~b~vajao~uwan ko~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan no~u piɬ~ɮəmak. ***i **** miħəʦa, pakajni ɬ~ɮəmak i b~b~vajao~uwan, mio~uʦo~ur ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u miso~uɾapaj mitəŋiɾ to~u manʦin masamaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak i b~b~vajao~uwan, katəŋiɾan o~u nika ɾaħəʦi pakajniaj sapipaɬ~ɮafo~uħ ato~u pipano~ukaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, awaaj ko~u kiħar saki no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, o~uja sato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u mafaɬ~ɮəsaj mifo~utiŋaj i, nawiro~u ʦaaj pipakinaɾi to~u miriʡaŋaj jinʦo~u~umin no~u tajwan sato~u, paini sato~u ko~uja ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj minʦin "o~u jinʦo~u~umin o~u papo~utaɾaj no~u niko~uwanan a finawɾan ʦiira, o~u tatəfo~uʦən mimaan, təŋiɾ sa ko~u no~u namo~u piɬ~ɮəmak" sato~u. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u "papo~utaɾaj niko~uwanan finawɾan" sanaj a so~uwaɾ, o~u piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uan to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a pakajraan miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i mo~utan *pakaɾajap to~u sakaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i, misamawmaw to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u so~ufitaj ʦi sai*o~u tso~u~umo~uro~u~u miʦħi ko~u mamikəriɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj, pasiinkiris, amiɾika miʦaɾiw to~u tamina no~u so~ufitaj ato~u ko~umo~uŋ kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi ri sənto~uko~u~u, iko~ur sarakataj so~uto~uko~u~u no~u tajwan ʦi kab~b~vajama so~u~ukəno~uri o~u niso~uɾapaj to~u tajwan itija. **i **** miħəʦaan, masapinaŋ to~u no~u inkiris, amiɾika ko~u pisamawmaw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itija, o~una painiaj to~u ko~u manʦin to~u rato~uħ, misəɾiʦaj ko~u pinaŋan no~u manʦin itija, o~uja nano~u "papo~utaɾaj niko~uwanan finawɾan" patijo~uɾ to~u "taɾaʦo~uwa ko~uja finawɾan ʦaaj ka i rikəʦ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u, nika i saɾaɾo~umaʡaj sakwan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ʦaira" sato~u, o~u inkiris, amiɾika patiko~uɾ miaɾa to~uja tamina. ***o~u nipipaəkəɾ no~u saki kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itija, təɾak sato~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ɬ~ɮəmak no~u so~ufitaj, nikawrira pakaɾajap ʦi sai*o~u tso~u~umo~uro~u~u miʦħi to~u piʡəsəs to~u nika ko~uəsit ko~u paʦaʡo~uf nira, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa o~u sakaɾasawaɬ~ɮ no~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ako~u ko~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u jinʦo~u~umin ko~u ŋaʡaj saan, saka pako~unira ħan to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nika iko~ur no~u ɬ~ɮəmak niʦo~urʦo~uran ko~u tatiiħaj niɬ~ɮəmakan nira. ****i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ira ko~u *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw nai səɾiao~u (ʦəʦən no~u pinto~uŋ) maʦakat, ira ko~u kaɾaɾo~uo~ut itija. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u i simən (simən no~u mo~utan i pinto~uŋ), taɾaʦo~uwa kiəməɾ ko~u paiwan finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u ʦaaj ka ʡaɾo~uman ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, masafa to~u a tarariko~ur. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾəfək to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u kasaŋasaw finawɾan, maʡəmin mato~uɬ~ɮo~uħ ko~u ɾo~umaʡ itija. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, kasaŋasaw finawɾan matapiʡ to~u, nano~uja sa paħərək kina ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. paro~umaaj nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan a ɬ~ɮəmak *patirəŋ to~u kaħiʦəraan i paħərək to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nika ʦaaj ka tatami ko~u kaʡo~urip a taɬ~ɮanʦaaj, ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦən ko~u pisaʡo~usi i, maɾifo~uŋaj maɾito~usaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ro~uma a so~uwaɾ, kaitini i tajwan, saɾo~uŋan aɾa kina to~usa ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u saɾifo~uŋ, maɬ~ɮəŋaaj mapataj mataʡəɾif ko~u *** tamɬ~ɮaw, patinako~uən i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan mapatajaj ʦaaj ka rao~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ** tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ʦaaj ka nanam to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a ʦimafaɬ~ɮəsaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. **iko~ur no~u pio~uʦo~ur no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u so~ufitaj ni o~uʦo~uran no~u manʦin niso~uɾap to~u tajwan ʦi sħən b~b~vao~u*ħən itija, ipiso~uɾapan to~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮəmak mirao~uɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u sapifo~uo~utaw. iko~ur no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan a masaso~uwaɾ, miɾijaw ko~u manʦin to~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ sako~uwan, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u piɾijas so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~urasaka ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ saka tarariko~ur o~u sanaj to~u i kaɾaɾiʦajan, kiɾim o~u sanaj to~u taro~uko~us no~u inkiris a ʦi b~vəto~uma a masasiɾiʡaj. o~uniriħanaw ni b~vəto~uma to~u kaɾaɾiʡaʦa no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, saka saʡiʦəɾ o~u sanaj to~u masaso~uwaɾ. i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, masasitəɾək ko~u tato~usaaj to~u "b~b~vəijiŋ pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan təɾək", pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u təɾək o~u "paɬ~ɮama to~u finawɾan a ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ" ko~u piħamo~un pio~uʦo~ur no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u so~ufitaj. ***o~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ kai "paɬ~ɮama to~u finawɾan a ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ" a "finawɾan" to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piħamo~un to~u finawɾan no~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u, matija o~u sapiħajɬ~ɮa no~u manʦin o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u o~u sanaj, o~u sapiɾaħəʦiaw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miħao~up to~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u "rjo~u~ukjo~u~u a sətək", saka patirəŋ sato~u to~u o~ukinawa-kən, miɾaħəʦi to~u pasitəno~ukaj ko~u pirikəʦ ato~u no~u nijaro~uʡ a sako~uwan. iko~ur miɾijaŋ ko~u manʦin to~unini, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ "finawɾan" sanaj o~u piɾəʦaɬ~ɮ piɬ~ɮama to~u mafaɬ~ɮəsaj a mifo~utiŋaj iʡajaw, nika awaaj ko~u paħərəkan no~u kasaso~uwaɾ, taŋasa to~u i nissħinsənso~u (*iawo~u~u *ħan*ħəŋ) a matapiʡ, awaaj to~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u manʦin to~u saki saɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u a maɾaɾijaŋ, nano~uja sa miħaiɬ~ɮa ko~u kasakitakit to~unini. ****iko~ur a kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i mo~utan, mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak no~u manʦin to~uja asimaanaj sanaj pinaŋan, ħaɾo~u patirəŋ to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miko~uwan kasanijaro~uʡ sako~uwan ato~u pasisawaɾi ko~u pimataŋ, itija to~u masapinaŋ ko~u sakiɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u paɾa a fanaʡ. nika mapaini to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u kaʦifaɬ~ɮəs no~u saɾifo~uŋ, o~u nianaj ko~u pisaħaɾaka no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u sakiisi isiŋan ko~u pakajraan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. mikawitaj: ʦħən b~b~vaijan (sin tajwan ħəp*ŋ kikiŋkaj) === mifaɾiʦaj: masao~u nikar ===
S.FORM: == Lalood i Motan == 10/18 Romi'adan no likisi: Lalood i Motan. ​I 1871 miheca 10 folad 18 romi'ad, matiya to ko rakat no tamina no Ryukyu, malaheci ko demak mamipatiko to ko rakat no tamina minokay, nika caay ko kafana'an pakalitemoh to faliyos, o cecay tamina Miyakojima moraraw to ko rakat a mapawpaw saka itira to i Bayaowan (Mancu no Pintong). Tahacarcar to koya tamina a eca to kanga'ay romakat, talasekal to ko 69 ko tamdaw mikidama, katalasekalan ira ko 3 tamdaw ko ma'alolay a mapatay, dengan to 66 ko tamdaw ko talasekalan mapa'orip. ​​O sarakatay demak i Bayaowan koni, o lalengatan no lalood i Motan koni. ​Kafadesan no Miyakojima a tamdaw ​​Oya katacarcaran no tamina a sekal tala'ayaw i, malitemoh ko Payrang a tamdaw, o kanga'ayan a romakat nasa koya mapa'oripay tamdaw, nika i karomakatan i lalan, milengat ko faloco' no Payrang to tatiihay, cefisen naira ko dafong no tamdaw no Miyakojima, matalaw to koya tamdaw no tamina to kakari'angaw, saka nitelek to caira to piiked to Payrang a romakat. ​​​Pacarcar ko tamdaw no tamina i lalan a komaen patireng to ngayangay milafin, i ray a lalan militemoh haca ko Paiwan a finacadan (Kawse ngasaw), padamaen no finacadan caira, pafeli to kakaenen, patadoen haca paini to pilafinan. Saka tosa romi'ad, talalotok ko finawlan no sangasaw a mi'adop, mingitangit to tamdaw no tamina akaa kasadak nahan, tengil han to noya tamdaw no tamina malo sakaci'angi a katalawen. O nika eca ka songila' ko kalalicay (o nikafokil to sowal) ato rofoen no ngasaw a finacadan o sanay ko katalaw, matimiay saka, telak sato koya tamdaw no tamina a milaliw. ​​​​Oya sato, mafana' to ko finawlan no finacadan to nika eca pasifana' no tamdaw no tamina to piliyas, paretatenga o tatiihay koni demak sato, misatapang to misolap mihapinang toya tamdaw no tamina. O pilaliw noya tamdaw no tamina midoedo to 'alo malitemoh ko cecay laloma'an, o milali'acaay to Yincumin koni laloma'an, mihayda midama to tamdaw no tamina. Nika oya sato finawlan no finacadan matama to naira koya tamdaw no tamina, milaop a tayra toya kaitiraan no malali'acaay loma', caayto pakasongila' ko kalalicay no tawki, saka ira to ko cimapatayay tamdaw no tamina. Ikor to o kakitaan no Paoli ngasaw ci Yan yuwan ko misalofay to demak, mapa'oripay aca ko 12 tamdaw no tamina, mapadama to no citodongay, saka tosa miheca 6 folad sanga'ay sato ko piliyas a minokay naira. Awaay ko todong salongoc no Mancin to papotalay finawlan ​Katengilan koya mafadesay tamdaw no tamina itiya, maleca toya demak i Bayaowan, mipadama ko Mancin toni, saka patilidan no Ryukyu to piaray, saka awaay ko sapitiyolaw to ikor noni a demak. ​​O Dipong sato itiya, o Meijiishin, mipalasawad to mi'erecay pikowan, pasitenokay ko pirikec, palasawad to kasasiiked no pikowan, o nano Satsuma-han pala o Kagoshima ken. Nikawrira oya nano Satsuma-han ko pidoedoan no Ryukyu i, saan pasi Congko ko padahof, orasaka "Tosaay ko pasayraan" pakayraan caay ho kafalic, nika o Dipong halafin to ko pisamawmaw to saki Congko Dipong a kalali'acaan sakinaira no kicay, o sakanga'ayaw no Dipong ya sanay, saka pakayni toya demak i Bayaowan ko sakatadamaan no pidemak. ​​​I 1873 miheca, pakayni demak i Bayaowan, miocor ko Dipong to misolapay mitengil to Mancin masamaan to demak i Bayaowan, katengilan o nika laheci pakayniay sapipadafoh ato pipanokay a demak, awaay ko kihar saki no Dipong a todong, oya sato Dipong to mafadesay mifotingay i, nawiro caay pipakinali to miri'angay yincumin no Taywan sato, paini sato koya citodongay Mincin "o yincumin o papotalay no nikowanan a finawlan ciira, o tatefocen mimaan, tengil sa ko no namo pidemak" sato. Midotoc to "papotalay nikowanan finawlan" sanay a sowal, o pidoedoan to no Dipong a pakayraan milood. Kalalood i Motan ​Pakalayap to sakacitodong i, misamawmaw to ko Dipong tonini a demak, oya kakeridan no sofitay ci Saigo Tsumoru michi ko mamikerid to sofitay, pasiInkiris, Amilika micaliw to tamina no sofitay ato komong kalalood ci Ri sentoku, ikor sarakatay sotoku no Taywan ci Kabayama Sukenori o nisolapay to Taywan itiya. ​​I 1874 mihecaan, masapinang to no Inkiris, Amilika ko pisamawmaw no Dipong itiya, ona painiay to ko Mancin to ratoh, miselicay ko pinangan no Mancin itiya, oya nano "papotalay nikowanan finawlan" patiyol to "talacowa koya finawlan caay ka i rikec no Congko, nika i salaloma'ay sakwan no Congko caira" sato, o Inkiris, Amilika patikol miala toya tamina. ​​​O nipipaekel no saki kacacofelan a demak no Dipong itiya, telak sato pipalasawad demak no sofitay, nikawrira pakalayap ci Saigo Tsumoru michi to pi'eses to nika koesit ko paca'of nira, sacisowal sa o sakalasawad no kacitodong no kakeridan ako ko pilood to yincumin ko nga'ay saan, saka pakonira han to no Dipong, nika ikor no demak nicorcoran ko tatiihay nidemakan nira. ​​​​I 1874 miheca 5 folad 12 romi'ad, sofitay no Dipong ira ko 3,600 tamdaw nai Seliao (Cecen no Pintong) macakat, ira ko kalaloot itiya. 5 folad 22 romi'ad, malalood to i Simen (Simen no Motan i Pintong), talacowa kiemel ko Paiwan finacadan, nika cango'ot ko sapilood ato caay ka 'aloman ko tamdaw, masafa to a tararikor. I 6 folad 1 romi'ad, milefek to no Dipong ko kasangasaw finawlan, ma'emin matodoh ko loma' itiya. 7 folad 1 romi'ad, kasangasaw finawlan matapi' to, nanoya sa paherek kina lalood. Paromaay nisafaloco'an a demak ​Patireng to kahiceraan i paherek to lalood no Dipong, nika caay ka tatami ko ka'orip a tadancaay, dotocen ko pisa'osi i, malifongay malitosaay ko tamdaw, roma a sowal, kaitini i Taywan, salongan ala kina tosa ciadada to salifong, madengaay mapatay mata'elif ko 500 tamdaw, patinakoen i kalaloodan mapatayay caay ka raod ko 20 tamdaw, o caay ka nanam to romi'ad a cimafadesay to tamdaw ko Dipong. ​​Ikor no piocor no Dipong to sofitay ni ocoran no Mancin nisolap to Taywan ci Shen Baozhen itiya, ipisolapan to kalodemak miraod to sofitay no Dipong to sapifootaw. Ikor no kalaloodan a masasowal, miliyaw ko Mancin to todong salongoc sakowan, milongoc to piliyas sofitay no Dipong, orasaka cango'ot to tamdaw ato dafong ko Dipong saka tararikor o sanay to i kalalicayan, kilim o sanay to tarokos no Inkiris a ci Vetoma a masasili'ay. Onirihanaw ni Vetoma to kalali'aca no demak, saka sa'icel o sanay to masasowal. I 10 folad 31 romi'ad, masasitelek ko tatosaay to "Beijing patodongan telek", patodongan no telek o "padama to finawlan a lowad" ko pihamon piocor no Dipong to sofitay. ​​​O lalowadan no Dipong kai "padama to finawlan a lowad" a "finawlan" todong pihamon to finawlan no Ryukyu, matiya o sapihayda no Mancin ono Dipong a todong ko Ryukyu o sanay, o sapilaheciaw no Dipong mihaop to Ryukyu "Ryukyu a setek", saka patireng sato to Okinawa-ken, milaheci to pasitenokay ko pirikec ato no niyaro' a sakowan. Ikor miliyang ko Mancin tonini, todong "finawlan" sanay o pilecad pidama to mafadesay a mifotingay I'ayaw, nika awaay ko paherekan no kasasowal, tangasa to i Nisshinsenso (Jiawu zhanzheng) a matapi', awaay to ko faloco' no Mancin to saki salongoc to Ryukyu a malaliyang, nanoya sa mihaida ko kasakitakit tonini. ​​​​Ikor a kalalood i Motan, mafalic to ko pidemak no Mancin toya asimaanay sanay pinangan, halo patireng to citodongay mikowan kasaniyaro' sakowan ato pasisawali ko pimatang, itiya to masapinang ko sakilalood no pala a fana'. Nika mapaini to ko Dipong to kacifades no salifong, o nianay ko pisahalaka no Dipong to sakiisi isingan ko pakayraan no demak. Mikawitay: Chen Baiyan (Sin Taywan hepíng kikingkay) === Mifalicay: Masao Nikar ===
S.PHON: == ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i mo~utan == **/** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan no~u ɾikisi: ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i mo~utan. *i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, matija to~u ko~u rakat no~u tamina no~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u, maɾaħəʦi ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak mamipatiko~u to~u ko~u rakat no~u tamina mino~ukaj, nika ʦaaj ko~u kafanaʡan pakaɾitəmo~uħ to~u faɾijo~us, o~u ʦəʦaj tamina mijako~ujima mo~uraraw to~u ko~u rakat a mapawpaw saka itira to~u i b~b~vajao~uwan (manʦo~u~u no~u pinto~uŋ). taħaʦarʦar to~u ko~uja tamina a əʦa to~u kaŋaʡaj ro~umakat, taɾasəkaɾ to~u ko~u ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mikiɬ~ɮama, kataɾasəkaɾan ira ko~u * tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u maʡaɾo~uɾaj a mapataj, ɬ~ɮəŋan to~u ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u taɾasəkaɾan mapaʡo~urip. **o~u sarakataj ɬ~ɮəmak i b~b~vajao~uwan ko~uni, o~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i mo~utan ko~uni. *kafaɬ~ɮəsan no~u mijako~ujima a tamɬ~ɮaw **o~uja kataʦarʦaran no~u tamina a səkaɾ taɾaʡajaw i, maɾitəmo~uħ ko~u pajraŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u kaŋaʡajan a ro~umakat nasa ko~uja mapaʡo~uripaj tamɬ~ɮaw, nika i karo~umakatan i ɾaɾan, miɾəŋat ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u pajraŋ to~u tatiiħaj, ʦəfisən naira ko~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u mijako~ujima, mataɾaw to~u ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina to~u kakariʡaŋaw, saka nitəɾək to~u ʦaira to~u piikəɬ~ɮ to~u pajraŋ a ro~umakat. ***paʦarʦar ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina i ɾaɾan a ko~umaən patirəŋ to~u ŋajaŋaj miɾafin, i raj a ɾaɾan miɾitəmo~uħ ħaʦa ko~u paiwan a finaʦaɬ~ɮan (kawsə ŋasaw), paɬ~ɮamaən no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ʦaira, pafəɾi to~u kakaənən, pataɬ~ɮo~uən ħaʦa paini to~u piɾafinan. saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, taɾaɾo~uto~uk ko~u finawɾan no~u saŋasaw a miʡaɬ~ɮo~up, miŋitaŋit to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina akaa kasaɬ~ɮak naħan, təŋiɾ ħan to~u no~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina maɾo~u sakaʦiʡaŋi a kataɾawən. o~u nika əʦa ka so~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u kaɾaɾiʦaj (o~u nikafo~ukiɾ to~u so~uwaɾ) ato~u ro~ufo~uən no~u ŋasaw a finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u sanaj ko~u kataɾaw, matimiaj saka, təɾak sato~u ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina a miɾaɾiw. ****o~uja sato~u, mafanaʡ to~u ko~u finawɾan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u nika əʦa pasifanaʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina to~u piɾijas, parətatəŋa o~u tatiiħaj ko~uni ɬ~ɮəmak sato~u, misatapaŋ to~u miso~uɾap miħapinaŋ to~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina. o~u piɾaɾiw no~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u ʡaɾo~u maɾitəmo~uħ ko~u ʦəʦaj ɾaɾo~umaʡan, o~u miɾaɾiʡaʦaaj to~u jinʦo~u~umin ko~uni ɾaɾo~umaʡan, miħajɬ~ɮa miɬ~ɮama to~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina. nika o~uja sato~u finawɾan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan matama to~u naira ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina, miɾao~up a tajra to~uja kaitiraan no~u maɾaɾiʡaʦaaj ɾo~umaʡ, ʦaajto~u pakaso~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u kaɾaɾiʦaj no~u tawki, saka ira to~u ko~u ʦimapatajaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina. iko~ur to~u o~u kakitaan no~u pao~uɾi ŋasaw ʦi jan jo~u~uwan ko~u misaɾo~ufaj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, mapaʡo~uripaj aʦa ko~u ** tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina, mapaɬ~ɮama to~u no~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, saka to~usa miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saŋaʡaj sato~u ko~u piɾijas a mino~ukaj naira. awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u manʦin to~u papo~utaɾaj finawɾan *katəŋiɾan ko~uja mafaɬ~ɮəsaj tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tamina itija, maɾəʦa to~uja ɬ~ɮəmak i b~b~vajao~uwan, mipaɬ~ɮama ko~u manʦin to~uni, saka patiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u to~u piaraj, saka awaaj ko~u sapitijo~uɾaw to~u iko~ur no~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak. **o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ sato~u itija, o~u məijiisħin, mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u miʡərəʦaj piko~uwan, pasitəno~ukaj ko~u pirikəʦ, paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u kasasiikəɬ~ɮ no~u piko~uwan, o~u nano~u satso~u~uma-ħan paɾa o~u ka*o~usħima kən. nikawrira o~uja nano~u satso~u~uma-ħan ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uan no~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u i, saan pasi ʦo~uŋko~u ko~u paɬ~ɮaħo~uf, o~urasaka "to~usaaj ko~u pasajraan" pakajraan ʦaaj ħo~u kafaɾiʦ, nika o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ħaɾafin to~u ko~u pisamawmaw to~u saki ʦo~uŋko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan sakinaira no~u kiʦaj, o~u sakaŋaʡajaw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ja sanaj, saka pakajni to~uja ɬ~ɮəmak i b~b~vajao~uwan ko~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan no~u piɬ~ɮəmak. ***i **** miħəʦa, pakajni ɬ~ɮəmak i b~b~vajao~uwan, mio~uʦo~ur ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u miso~uɾapaj mitəŋiɾ to~u manʦin masamaan to~u ɬ~ɮəmak i b~b~vajao~uwan, katəŋiɾan o~u nika ɾaħəʦi pakajniaj sapipaɬ~ɮafo~uħ ato~u pipano~ukaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, awaaj ko~u kiħar saki no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, o~uja sato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u mafaɬ~ɮəsaj mifo~utiŋaj i, nawiro~u ʦaaj pipakinaɾi to~u miriʡaŋaj jinʦo~u~umin no~u tajwan sato~u, paini sato~u ko~uja ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj minʦin "o~u jinʦo~u~umin o~u papo~utaɾaj no~u niko~uwanan a finawɾan ʦiira, o~u tatəfo~uʦən mimaan, təŋiɾ sa ko~u no~u namo~u piɬ~ɮəmak" sato~u. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u "papo~utaɾaj niko~uwanan finawɾan" sanaj a so~uwaɾ, o~u piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uan to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a pakajraan miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i mo~utan *pakaɾajap to~u sakaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i, misamawmaw to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, o~uja kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u so~ufitaj ʦi sai*o~u tso~u~umo~uro~u~u miʦħi ko~u mamikəriɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj, pasiinkiris, amiɾika miʦaɾiw to~u tamina no~u so~ufitaj ato~u ko~umo~uŋ kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi ri sənto~uko~u~u, iko~ur sarakataj so~uto~uko~u~u no~u tajwan ʦi kab~b~vajama so~u~ukəno~uri o~u niso~uɾapaj to~u tajwan itija. **i **** miħəʦaan, masapinaŋ to~u no~u inkiris, amiɾika ko~u pisamawmaw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itija, o~una painiaj to~u ko~u manʦin to~u rato~uħ, misəɾiʦaj ko~u pinaŋan no~u manʦin itija, o~uja nano~u "papo~utaɾaj niko~uwanan finawɾan" patijo~uɾ to~u "taɾaʦo~uwa ko~uja finawɾan ʦaaj ka i rikəʦ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u, nika i saɾaɾo~umaʡaj sakwan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ʦaira" sato~u, o~u inkiris, amiɾika patiko~uɾ miaɾa to~uja tamina. ***o~u nipipaəkəɾ no~u saki kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ itija, təɾak sato~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ɬ~ɮəmak no~u so~ufitaj, nikawrira pakaɾajap ʦi sai*o~u tso~u~umo~uro~u~u miʦħi to~u piʡəsəs to~u nika ko~uəsit ko~u paʦaʡo~uf nira, saʦiso~uwaɾ sa o~u sakaɾasawaɬ~ɮ no~u kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ako~u ko~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u jinʦo~u~umin ko~u ŋaʡaj saan, saka pako~unira ħan to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nika iko~ur no~u ɬ~ɮəmak niʦo~urʦo~uran ko~u tatiiħaj niɬ~ɮəmakan nira. ****i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ira ko~u *,*** tamɬ~ɮaw nai səɾiao~u (ʦəʦən no~u pinto~uŋ) maʦakat, ira ko~u kaɾaɾo~uo~ut itija. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u i simən (simən no~u mo~utan i pinto~uŋ), taɾaʦo~uwa kiəməɾ ko~u paiwan finaʦaɬ~ɮan, nika ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut ko~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ato~u ʦaaj ka ʡaɾo~uman ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, masafa to~u a tarariko~ur. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾəfək to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u kasaŋasaw finawɾan, maʡəmin mato~uɬ~ɮo~uħ ko~u ɾo~umaʡ itija. * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, kasaŋasaw finawɾan matapiʡ to~u, nano~uja sa paħərək kina ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ. paro~umaaj nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan a ɬ~ɮəmak *patirəŋ to~u kaħiʦəraan i paħərək to~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, nika ʦaaj ka tatami ko~u kaʡo~urip a taɬ~ɮanʦaaj, ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦən ko~u pisaʡo~usi i, maɾifo~uŋaj maɾito~usaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ro~uma a so~uwaɾ, kaitini i tajwan, saɾo~uŋan aɾa kina to~usa ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u saɾifo~uŋ, maɬ~ɮəŋaaj mapataj mataʡəɾif ko~u *** tamɬ~ɮaw, patinako~uən i kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan mapatajaj ʦaaj ka rao~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ** tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ʦaaj ka nanam to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a ʦimafaɬ~ɮəsaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ. **iko~ur no~u pio~uʦo~ur no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u so~ufitaj ni o~uʦo~uran no~u manʦin niso~uɾap to~u tajwan ʦi sħən b~b~vao~u*ħən itija, ipiso~uɾapan to~u kaɾo~uɬ~ɮəmak mirao~uɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u sapifo~uo~utaw. iko~ur no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan a masaso~uwaɾ, miɾijaw ko~u manʦin to~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ sako~uwan, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u piɾijas so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, o~urasaka ʦaŋo~uʡo~ut to~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ saka tarariko~ur o~u sanaj to~u i kaɾaɾiʦajan, kiɾim o~u sanaj to~u taro~uko~us no~u inkiris a ʦi b~vəto~uma a masasiɾiʡaj. o~uniriħanaw ni b~vəto~uma to~u kaɾaɾiʡaʦa no~u ɬ~ɮəmak, saka saʡiʦəɾ o~u sanaj to~u masaso~uwaɾ. i ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, masasitəɾək ko~u tato~usaaj to~u "b~b~vəijiŋ pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan təɾək", pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u təɾək o~u "paɬ~ɮama to~u finawɾan a ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ" ko~u piħamo~un pio~uʦo~ur no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u so~ufitaj. ***o~u ɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ kai "paɬ~ɮama to~u finawɾan a ɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ" a "finawɾan" to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piħamo~un to~u finawɾan no~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u, matija o~u sapiħajɬ~ɮa no~u manʦin o~uno~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u o~u sanaj, o~u sapiɾaħəʦiaw no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miħao~up to~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u "rjo~u~ukjo~u~u a sətək", saka patirəŋ sato~u to~u o~ukinawa-kən, miɾaħəʦi to~u pasitəno~ukaj ko~u pirikəʦ ato~u no~u nijaro~uʡ a sako~uwan. iko~ur miɾijaŋ ko~u manʦin to~unini, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ "finawɾan" sanaj o~u piɾəʦaɬ~ɮ piɬ~ɮama to~u mafaɬ~ɮəsaj a mifo~utiŋaj iʡajaw, nika awaaj ko~u paħərəkan no~u kasaso~uwaɾ, taŋasa to~u i nissħinsənso~u (*iawo~u~u *ħan*ħəŋ) a matapiʡ, awaaj to~u ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u manʦin to~u saki saɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u rjo~u~ukjo~u~u a maɾaɾijaŋ, nano~uja sa miħaiɬ~ɮa ko~u kasakitakit to~unini. ****iko~ur a kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i mo~utan, mafaɾiʦ to~u ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak no~u manʦin to~uja asimaanaj sanaj pinaŋan, ħaɾo~u patirəŋ to~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj miko~uwan kasanijaro~uʡ sako~uwan ato~u pasisawaɾi ko~u pimataŋ, itija to~u masapinaŋ ko~u sakiɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u paɾa a fanaʡ. nika mapaini to~u ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u kaʦifaɬ~ɮəs no~u saɾifo~uŋ, o~u nianaj ko~u pisaħaɾaka no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u sakiisi isiŋan ko~u pakajraan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. mikawitaj: ʦħən b~b~vaijan (sin tajwan ħəp*ŋ kikiŋkaj) === mifaɾiʦaj: masao~u nikar ===
